query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "researchstudio-idea: an evidence-grounded research-ideation skill suit" computer science
rationale: This paper is the foundational methodology and canonical reference (category d) for the user's question, as it introduces the specific "ResearchStudio-Idea" skill suite that the user explicitly names as the subject of their follow-up research. Additionally, it provides the empirical baseline (category c) regarding the 31 ideation sub-patterns and 15 reusable patterns derived from the ML conference corpus, which serves as the necessary prior work for any extension or evaluation of this system.
